     To add or change terms manually, edit GLOSSARY-MANUAL.md instead. -->

# Glossary

| Term | Context | Definition |
|------|---------|------------|
| **Apache Kafka** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-05-26-labs64io-ecosystem-under-the-hood.md), Message Broker | A distributed event streaming platform used for high-throughput, fault-tolerant asynchronous messaging between microservices. |
| **API Gateway** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-05-26-labs64io-ecosystem-under-the-hood.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md), [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md#general-architecture) | A reverse proxy that routes client requests to appropriate microservices, handling cross-cutting concerns like authentication, SSL termination, and rate limiting. |
| **API-first approach** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md#integration-messaging) | Design methodology where the OpenAPI specification is written first and server stubs are generated from it, ensuring the contract drives implementation. |
| **Audit Pipeline** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | The end-to-end audit event processing flow from REST ingestion through message broker, pipeline evaluation, transformation, and sinking to external destinations. |
| **Auth Proxy** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-07-securing-microservices-with-keycloak-and-traefik-authproxy.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A specialized service that centralizes authentication and authorization for multiple microservices using Traefik's forwardAuth middleware. |
| **BI (Billing Info)** | [Checkout](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/checkout/checkout-service-spec-en.md#11-core-domain-entities) | Buyer information required for invoicing and legal compliance (name, address, email, VAT ID, etc.). Captured at checkout time and stored as part of the CTX. |
| **Bootstrap Module** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A runtime-mounted transformer or sink module placed in transformers_bootstrap/ or sinks_bootstrap/ directories, git-ignored and loaded at startup for environment-specific plugins. |
| **Business Telemetry** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | An abstraction layer for emitting business-level metrics and events, decoupled from OpenTelemetry implementation details. |
| **Buyer** | [Checkout](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/checkout/checkout-service-spec-en.md#12-actors) | The end customer who interacts with the Checkout UI and completes the payment process. May be anonymous from the Checkout service perspective. |
| **CDN (Content Delivery Network)** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-05-2-5-29-labs64io-ecosystem-architecture.md) | A geographically distributed cache that serves static assets from edge locations to reduce latency. |
| **Condition Evaluator** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A component that evaluates pipeline conditions against audit events using operators like equals, contains, regex, and range comparisons. |
| **CorrelationIdFilter** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A cross-cutting filter that populates trace_id and span_id into the logging MDC for distributed tracing correlation. |
| **CTX (Checkout Transaction)** | [Checkout](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/checkout/checkout-service-spec-en.md#11-core-domain-entities) | A financial object created when the buyer initiates payment. Stores a reference to the originating PO, BI, SI, selected payment method, and current status (PENDING / FAILED / CANCELED / COMPLETED). |
| **Custom Resource (CR)** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-01-configuring-traefik-middleware-for-kubernetes.md), Traefik | A Kubernetes API extension that allows users to define custom resource types; Traefik uses CRs like Middleware and IngressRoute for traffic management. |
| **Custom Resource Definition (CRD)** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-01-configuring-traefik-middleware-for-kubernetes.md), Traefik | A Kubernetes resource that defines a new custom resource type, enabling the Kubernetes API to recognize and validate custom resources like Traefik's Middleware. |
| **Dead-Letter Queue (DLQ)** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A RabbitMQ queue that captures messages failing repeated processing attempts for later inspection. |
| **Distributed Tracing** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-05-26-labs64io-ecosystem-under-the-hood.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow), [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md) | A method for tracking requests as they flow through multiple microservices, enabling latency analysis and debugging across service boundaries. |
| **Dynamic PO Flow** | [Checkout](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/checkout/checkout-service-spec-en.md#2-dynamic-po-flow-cart-driven) | A checkout scenario where the Purchase Order is created on-the-fly by an external shop or cart at the moment the buyer clicks "Checkout", and the buyer is then redirected to the Checkout UI. |
| **FastAPI** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A modern, fast Python web framework used to build the AuditFlow transformer and sink services with automatic OpenAPI documentation. |
| **forwardAuth** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-01-configuring-traefik-middleware-for-kubernetes.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A Traefik middleware that delegates authentication decisions to an external service by forwarding request headers. |
| **GitHub Copilot** | [AI-Assisted Development](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-10-31-how-i-vibecoded-gammaledger.md) | An AI-powered coding assistant that provides code completions, chat-based refactoring, and agentic multi-file editing within IDEs. |
| **GlobalExceptionHandler** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A cross-cutting component that provides centralized exception handling and consistent error responses across the service. |
| **Grafana** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-07-07-pod-metrics-in-kubernetes.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md), [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md) | An open-source platform for creating dashboards and visualizing metrics, logs, and traces from Prometheus, Loki, and Tempo. |
| **Grafana Alloy** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A vendor-neutral observability collector that gathers metrics, logs, and traces for forwarding to backends like Prometheus, Loki, and Tempo. |
| **Grafana Tempo** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A distributed tracing backend that stores and queries traces, integrated with Grafana for visualization. |
| **Helm Chart** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-06-11-helm-chart-repository.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A package of pre-configured Kubernetes manifests that defines how a service and its dependencies are deployed. |
| **Helm Library Chart (chart-libs)** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A reusable Helm chart containing shared templates and helper functions used by service charts to eliminate duplication. |
| **Helm Override Strategy** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-06-24-helm-charts-override-strategy.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A configuration pattern that separates environment-specific values into a dedicated overrides directory mirroring the charts structure. |
| **helm-docs** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-06-16-helm-chart-documentation.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A tool that automatically generates README.md documentation from a Helm chart's values.yaml and Chart.yaml. |
| **helm-schema** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-06-16-helm-chart-documentation.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A Helm plugin that generates JSON Schema from values.yaml for IDE validation and auto-completion. |
| **Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA)** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-07-07-pod-metrics-in-kubernetes.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A Kubernetes controller that automatically scales the number of pod replicas based on observed CPU utilization or custom metrics from the Metrics Server. |
| **Identity Provider** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-05-29-labs64io-ecosystem-architecture.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A dedicated service that handles user authentication, token issuance, and identity management (e.g., Keycloak). |
| **Ingress** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-06-07-kubernetes-cheatsheet.md) | A Kubernetes resource that manages external HTTP/HTTPS access to services within the cluster, typically via an ingress controller like Traefik. |
| **IngressRoute** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-01-configuring-traefik-middleware-for-kubernetes.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A Traefik custom resource that defines routing rules and middleware chains for incoming HTTP traffic. |
| **ISO-4217** | [Checkout](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/checkout/checkout-service-spec-en.md#14-money-rules) | The international standard defining three-letter currency codes (e.g. USD, EUR) used to express the currency of a Purchase Order. |
| **justfile / just** | [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A command runner that defines project tasks in a cross-platform, self-documenting justfile. |
| **JWKS (JSON Web Key Set)** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-07-securing-microservices-with-keycloak-and-traefik-authproxy.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | A set of public keys published by an identity provider (e.g., Keycloak) used to verify JWT signatures. |
| **JWT (JSON Web Token)** | [Checkout](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/checkout/checkout-service-spec-en.md), [Payment Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-docs/blob/master/payment-gateway/readme.md) | A signed token used to authenticate and authorize API requests. The tenant identity is derived from the JWT payload. |
| **Keycloak** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-07-securing-microservices-with-keycloak-and-traefik-authproxy.md), [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md) | An open-source identity and access management server used for authentication, authorization, and token management. |
| **KeyResolver** | [API Gateway](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-07-14-protect-api-with-requestratelimiter.md) | A Spring Cloud Gateway component that extracts a unique identifier (e.g., IP address, user ID) from requests for rate limiting. |
| **Liveness Probe** | [Kubernetes](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-07-24-master-kubernetes-probes.md) | A Kubernetes probe that determines whether a container is running and healthy; failure triggers container restart. |
| **Loki** | [AuditFlow](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io-auditflow/blob/master/AGENTS.md), [Observability](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-06-11-helm-chart-repository.md) | A log aggregation system that collects and indexes logs from microservices for querying and visualization in Grafana. |
| **Metrics Server** | [Kubernetes](https://github.com/Labs64/labs64.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-07-07-pod-metrics-in-kubernetes.md) | A cluster-wide aggregator of resource usage data (CPU, memory) that exposes the Kubernetes Metrics API for autoscaling and kubectl top. |
| **Middleware** | API Gateway, Traefik | A Traefik component that modifies requests or responses before forwarding to services, enabling authentication, rate limiting, and header manipulation. |
